    Enable -ftrivial-auto-var-init flags for gcc >= 12

    Now that gcc >= 12 supports -ftrivial-auto-var-init, add it to
    bsd.compiler.mk's "init-all" feature.

    PR:             271047
    Reviewed by:    emaste
    MFC after:      3 days
